title: Prompting: Talking to AI
summary: The same model can give you a brilliant answer or a useless one - the difference is the prompt. Learn system prompts, few-shot examples, chain of thought, and why prompt engineering became a skill.

context.headline: What the model sees is all it knows
context.description: A model's answer is shaped by three inputs: the hidden system prompt setting the rules, your user prompt making the request, and whatever context is included alongside. Learning to shape these inputs is the single highest-leverage AI skill for a normal user.
context.when: The one layer of AI you fully control
